prompt: A clean anime-style full-body character illustration of a young woman squatting low on a plain light gray background, centered in frame, with a soft studio shadow beneath her. She has dark brown short bob hair with blunt straight bangs, slightly tousled ends, and a few loose strands around the face. Her expression is spiral half-lidded annoyed eyes, giving a tired, gloomy, slightly irritated look. She is wearing 4 visible clothing items: an oversized light gray hoodie with drawstrings and ribbed cuffs, dark blue denim short shorts with frayed hems, white scrunched ankle socks, and black low-top skate sneakers with white side stripes, white laces, and white soles. Her pose is a compact crouch with both knees up, one elbow resting on a knee, one hand partly covering the lower face or cheek, and the other hand hanging down near the front shoe. The art style is polished modern manga/anime key visual art with thin clean linework, smooth cel-shaded rendering, subtle fabric folds, natural skin highlights on the legs, and slightly oversized hoodie proportions. Emphasize a casual, moody, introverted vibe, minimalist composition, and a high-quality character-focused illustration.
